name: Amrendra Tripathi
summary: The ambience was very well maintained and beautiful, the staff and hospitality was very nice and appreciable. Food was also delicious, overall it is a must visit.
highlight: Beautiful ambience, gracious hospitality, delicious food.

name: Pratyush Prasad
summary: We tried the Rava Dosa and Paniyaram. Both were extremely delicious and definitely a must taste. The service was quick and atmosphere quite vibrant.
highlight: Rava Dosa and Paniyaram stood out with quick service.

name: Shubham Agarwal
summary: Truly a hidden gem if you are a south indian food lover. The food was really tasty and quality was top notch. The ambience, cutlery, food quality, quantity and pricing - ALL top notch!
highlight: A hidden gem for South Indian food lovers.
